dataset.name: Canonical Execution
dataset.description: Data extracted from the execution layer. This data is only derived by a single instance, are deduped, and are more complete and reliable than the execution_layer_p2p tables. These tables can be reliably JOINed on to hydrate other tables with information

columns.name: updated_date_time
columns.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated

columns.name: block_date_time
columns.description: The block timestamp

columns.name: block_number
columns.description: The block number

columns.name: block_hash
columns.description: The block hash

columns.name: author
columns.description: The block author

columns.name: gas_used
columns.description: The block gas used

columns.name: gas_limit
columns.description: The block gas limit

columns.name: extra_data
columns.description: The block extra data in hex

columns.name: extra_data_string
columns.description: The block extra data in UTF-8 string

columns.name: base_fee_per_gas
columns.description: The block base fee per gas

columns.name: meta_network_name
columns.description: Ethereum network name

tables.name: canonical_execution_storage_reads

columns.name: updated_date_time
columns.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated

columns.description: The block number

columns.name: transaction_index

columns.name: transaction_hash
columns.description: The transaction hash associated with the storage read

columns.name: internal_index
columns.description: The internal index of the storage read within the transaction

columns.name: contract_address
columns.description: The contract address associated with the storage read

columns.name: slot
columns.description: The storage slot key

columns.name: value
columns.description: The value read from the storage slot

columns.description: Ethereum network name

tables.name: canonical_execution_transaction_structlog
tables.description: Contains canonical execution transaction structlog data.

columns.name: updated_date_time
columns.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated

columns.name: block_number
columns.description: The block number

columns.name: transaction_hash
columns.description: The transaction hash

columns.name: transaction_index
columns.description: The transaction position in the block

columns.name: transaction_gas
columns.description: The transaction gas

columns.name: transaction_failed
columns.description: The transaction failed

columns.name: transaction_return_value
columns.description: The transaction return value

columns.name: index
columns.description: The index of this structlog in this transaction

columns.name: operation
columns.description: The operation

columns.name: gas
columns.description: The gas

columns.name: gas_cost
columns.description: The gas cost

columns.name: gas_used
columns.description: Actual gas consumed (computed from consecutive gas values)

columns.name: gas_self
columns.description: Gas consumed by this opcode only, excludes child frame gas for CALL/CREATE opcodes. sum(gas_self) = total execution gas without double counting

columns.name: depth
columns.description: The depth

columns.name: return_data
columns.description: The return data

columns.name: refund
columns.description: The refund

columns.name: error
columns.description: The error

columns.name: call_to_address
columns.description: Address of a CALL operation

columns.name: call_frame_id
columns.description: Sequential identifier for the call frame within the transaction

columns.name: call_frame_path
columns.description: Path of frame IDs from root to current frame

columns.name: meta_network_name
columns.description: Ethereum network name

tables.name: canonical_execution_transaction_structlog_agg
tables.description: Aggregated EVM execution data. Summary rows (operation="") contain frame metadata. Per-opcode rows contain aggregated gas/count per (frame, opcode).

columns.name: updated_date_time
columns.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated

columns.name: block_number
columns.description: The block number

columns.name: transaction_hash
columns.description: The transaction hash

columns.name: transaction_index
columns.description: The transaction position in the block

columns.name: call_frame_id
columns.description: Sequential frame ID within the transaction (0=root)

columns.name: parent_call_frame_id
columns.description: Parent frame ID (NULL for root frame)

columns.name: call_frame_path
columns.description: Path of frame IDs from root to current frame

columns.name: depth
columns.description: Call nesting depth (0=root)

columns.name: target_address
columns.description: Contract address being called

columns.name: call_type
columns.description: Call type: CALL/DELEGATECALL/STATICCALL/CALLCODE/CREATE/CREATE2 (empty for root)

columns.name: operation
columns.description: Opcode name for per-opcode rows, empty string for frame summary rows

columns.name: opcode_count
columns.description: Number of opcodes (total for summary row, count for per-opcode row)

columns.name: error_count
columns.description: Number of errors

columns.name: gas
columns.description: Gas consumed: SUM(gas_self) for per-opcode, frame self gas for summary

columns.name: gas_cumulative
columns.description: Cumulative gas: SUM(gas_used) for per-opcode, frame total for summary

columns.name: min_depth
columns.description: Minimum depth where opcode appeared (per-opcode rows)

columns.name: max_depth
columns.description: Maximum depth where opcode appeared (per-opcode rows)

columns.name: memory_words_sum_before
columns.description: SUM(ceil(memory_bytes/32)) before each opcode executes. Used with sq_sum to compute memory expansion gas.

columns.name: memory_words_sum_after
columns.description: SUM(ceil(memory_bytes/32)) after each opcode executes.

columns.name: memory_words_sq_sum_before
columns.description: SUM(words_before²). With sum_before, enables exact memory gas via E[cost(after)] - E[cost(before)].

columns.name: memory_words_sq_sum_after
columns.description: SUM(words_after²). With sum_after, enables exact memory gas via E[cost(after)] - E[cost(before)].

columns.name: memory_expansion_gas
columns.description: SUM(memory_expansion_gas). Exact per-opcode memory expansion cost, pre-computed to avoid intDiv rounding in SQL reconstruction.

columns.name: cold_access_count
columns.description: Number of cold storage/account accesses (EIP-2929). cold_gas = cold_count * (cold_cost - warm_cost).

columns.name: gas_refund
columns.description: Gas refund (root summary row only)

columns.name: intrinsic_gas
columns.description: Intrinsic gas (root summary row only, computed)

columns.name: meta_network_name
columns.description: Ethereum network name
